businessSummary.oneLiner: Southeast Asia's largest e-commerce (Shopee), digital entertainment (Garena/Free Fire), and fintech (Monee) operator — Singapore-based global internet company
businessSummary.description: Sea Limited is a Singapore-based global technology company. Q4 2025 revenue $6.85B (+38.4% YoY), EPS $0.77 (missed consensus $1.05 by $0.28). FY2025 revenue $22.94B (+36.4%), net income $1.58B. Closed 3/6 at $91.98 (-3.71%), recovering from post-earnings -26% crash on 3/3 but slipping again on macro selloff. Shopee targets +25% GMV growth for 2026 while maintaining EBITDA at 2025+ levels. Jefferies cut to $150, Morgan Stanley maintains $173. Forward P/E 22.96x, PEG 1.33.
howTheyMakeMoney: E-commerce (Shopee): #1 Southeast Asian e-commerce platform. GMV-based fees and advertising. Q4 revenue +35.8%
Digital Financial (Monee/SeaMoney): Digital payments, lending, insurance. Q4 revenue +54.3%, loan book $9.2B (+80%)
Digital Entertainment (Garena): Free Fire and other game operations. Q4 bookings +23.8% YoY
keyProducts: Shopee: #1 e-commerce platform in Southeast Asia and Latin America
Free Fire: Globally popular battle royale mobile game
SeaMoney/Monee: Digital payments and financial services, $9.2B loan book

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable for growth. E-commerce + fintech premium

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (YoY)
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2025 high growth continues. Shopee + Monee dual engines

keyMetrics.name: EPS Surprise
keyMetrics.interpretation: Q4 EPS $0.77 vs $1.05 consensus. Growth investment over profit

keyMetrics.name: PEG Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Fair to slightly elevated vs growth

growthDrivers.title: EPS Miss but Revenue +6.3% Surprise — Management Chose Growth
growthDrivers.description: Q4 EPS $0.77 vs $1.05 consensus miss, but revenue $6.85B beat by +6.3%. Management deliberately prioritized growth investments over profits.

growthDrivers.title: Shopee 2026 GMV +25% Growth Guidance — Aggressive Expansion
growthDrivers.description: Management: 2026 GMV +25% YoY target, EBITDA maintained at 2025+ absolute levels. Ad revenue +70%, ad take rate +80bps.

growthDrivers.title: Monee Fintech Acceleration — Loan Book $9.2B (+80%)
growthDrivers.description: AI-powered underwriting expanding lending reach. 37M active credit users, NPL 1.1% healthy. Fintech emerging as growth engine.

growthDrivers.title: RSI 34.5 — Entering Oversold Territory
growthDrivers.description: Post-3/3 -26% crash pushed RSI to 34.5. Near 52-week lows with technical bounce potential.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 52% Southeast Asian e-commerce market share (Shopee), fintech-e-commerce-gaming ecosystem synergy, and net cash position form the core moat.

moats.description: Shopee holds 52% market share in Southeast Asia. Vertically integrated with Shopee Express logistics.
Monee (SeaMoney) provides payments and lending to Shopee users. Maximum cross-sell.
Globally popular game provides stable cash flow to fund e-commerce investments.

competitors.name: Grab Holdings
competitors.detail: Southeast Asian super-app. Mobility + fintech competition

competitors.name: Lazada (Alibaba)
competitors.detail: Alibaba-backed Southeast Asian e-commerce. Behind Shopee

competitors.name: TikTok Shop
competitors.detail: Social commerce growing rapidly in Southeast Asia. Key threat

competitors.name: MercadoLibre
competitors.detail: Latin American e-commerce. Competes with Shopee's LatAm business

recentNews.headline: SE -3.71% — Macro Selloff Drags Recovery, Post-Earnings Momentum Fading
recentNews.significance: After 3-day recovery from 3/3 -26% crash, Friday macro selloff pushed shares down -3.71%.

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: 'Panic Created a Rare Strong Buy Opportunity'
recentNews.significance: Post-earnings crash creates oversold conditions. Net cash and strong fundamentals signal buying opportunity.

recentNews.headline: Jefferies Cuts SE Target to $150 — Reflects 2026 Guidance
recentNews.significance: Target adjusted for 2026 GMV +25% guidance. Morgan Stanley maintains Overweight $173. Both still well above current price.

recentNews.headline: Q4 2025 Results — Revenue $6.85B (+38.4%), EPS $0.77 ($0.28 Miss)
recentNews.significance: Revenue beat by +6.3% but EPS miss triggered -26% selloff. Growth investment expansion pressured profits.

recentNews.headline: Google AI Partnership — AI Tools Across Shopee, Monee, Garena
recentNews.significance: Sea partners with Google to deploy AI tools across all business units. E-commerce and fintech efficiency gains expected.

analystOpinions.notableComment: StockAnalysis: 11 analysts Strong Buy, target $189 (+106%). Jefferies: Cut to $150. Morgan Stanley: Overweight $173 maintained. All analysts maintain Buy despite EPS miss.

risks.title: Continued EPS Misses Possible — Growth Investment vs Profit
risks.description: Management deliberately expanding growth investments. 2026 EBITDA guidance of '2025+ levels' implies limited profit growth.

risks.title: TikTok Shop Southeast Asian Threat
risks.description: Social commerce growing rapidly in Southeast Asia. Shopee market share erosion risk.

risks.title: Fintech Lending Risk — $9.2B Book, +80% Growth
risks.description: Rapid loan book growth risks NPL expansion. Economic downturn could trigger bad debt surge.

risks.title: Southeast Asian Macroeconomic Uncertainty
risks.description: Iran conflict, oil price surge, US tariffs negatively impact Southeast Asian exports and consumption.

risks.title: Share Dilution +5.54% YoY
risks.description: Stock-based compensation causing 5%+ annual dilution. Limits per-share value growth.

buyReasons.title: RSI 34.5 Oversold + Forward P/E 22.96x — Valuation Attractive
buyReasons.rationale: 26% crash creates oversold conditions. +36% revenue growth at Forward P/E 23x is a rare opportunity.

buyReasons.title: Shopee GMV +25% + Monee +54% — Dual Growth Engines
buyReasons.rationale: E-commerce and fintech growing simultaneously. Ecosystem synergy maximized.

buyReasons.title: All 11 Analysts Buy — Consensus $189 (+106%)
buyReasons.rationale: 9 Strong Buy, 2 Buy. No opinion changes despite EPS miss. Long-term growth story intact.

buyReasons.title: Google AI Partnership — All Business Unit Efficiency
buyReasons.rationale: Google AI tools to enhance Shopee recommendations, Monee underwriting, Garena personalization.

overallOpinion: SE at $91.98 is finding a floor in oversold territory (RSI 34.5) after the 3/3 -26% crash. Forward P/E 22.96x is a reasonable price for +36% revenue growth.
The EPS miss (-$0.28) was caused by deliberate growth investment expansion — management chose 2026 GMV +25% growth over near-term profits.
Monee fintech (+54%, $9.2B loans) is emerging as a growth engine that could surpass Shopee. However, NPL risk exists in an economic downturn.
All 11 analysts maintain Buy with consensus $189 (+106%) — a strong long-term conviction signal. Even Jefferies' cut ($150) implies +63% upside.
Bottom line: Panic selling created an oversold opportunity. TikTok Shop is a real threat, but the Shopee + Monee ecosystem won't collapse from short-term competition.

sources.description: Q4 results summary, Google AI partnership
